# Another Stupid Monday

> Another Stupid Monday is a wellbeing, self-care, and self-reflection app created by psychotherapist Halim Jarrar. It offers one small task each week, starting Monday, without streaks or pressure to catch up.

## Authoritative pages
- Product: https://another-stupid-monday.halim-jarrar.de/
- Dutch (Netherlands): https://another-stupid-monday.halim-jarrar.de/nl/
- German (Germany): https://another-stupid-monday.halim-jarrar.de/de/
- Spanish (Spain): https://another-stupid-monday.halim-jarrar.de/es/
- French (France): https://another-stupid-monday.halim-jarrar.de/fr/
- Portuguese (Portugal): https://another-stupid-monday.halim-jarrar.de/pt/
- How it works: https://another-stupid-monday.halim-jarrar.de/how-it-works/
- Questions: https://another-stupid-monday.halim-jarrar.de/questions/
- Creator: https://another-stupid-monday.halim-jarrar.de/about/
- Product facts: https://another-stupid-monday.halim-jarrar.de/press/
- Privacy: https://asm.halim-jarrar.de/privacy/
- Terms: https://asm.halim-jarrar.de/terms/
- Support: https://asm.halim-jarrar.de/support/
- EU compliance: https://asm.halim-jarrar.de/compliance/
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/another-stupid-monday/id6782894277
- Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.anotherstupidmonday.app

## Boundary
The app is not psychotherapy, diagnosis, medical treatment, emergency assistance, or crisis support.
